content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to prioritize which unlabeled data gets stored and retained in cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems, pruning low-novelty, low-surprise inactive memory traces to free up capacity for high-value active learning samples. This creates a self-organizing memory that automatically aligns retention with the agent’s current active learning uncertainty reduction goals.
